description: Era III tactical cards. Each player is dealt 3 at the start of Era III and may play one per turn during game_loop.

cards.name: Carga Heroica
cards.flavorText: Los caballos estallan en una línea de acero.
cards.flavorText_en: Horses erupt in a line of steel.
cards.mechanicalText: +2 ataque a todas tus unidades durante este turno.
cards.mechanicalText_en: +2 attack to all your units this turn.

cards.name: Bálsamo Élfico
cards.flavorText: Donde caen las lágrimas de la druida, la carne se cierra.
cards.flavorText_en: Where the druid's tears fall, flesh closes.
cards.mechanicalText: Restaura la vida completa de uno de tus stacks.
cards.mechanicalText_en: Fully heal one of your stacks.

cards.name: Leva del Pueblo
cards.flavorText: Cada aldea entrega a sus hijos al acero.
cards.flavorText_en: Every hamlet gives its sons to the steel.
cards.mechanicalText: Recluta 1 infantería gratis en tu capital.
cards.mechanicalText_en: Recruit 1 infantry free in your capital.

cards.name: Arcas del Rey
cards.flavorText: El tesoro, por fin, se abre.
cards.flavorText_en: The treasury, at last, is opened.

cards.name: Viento Favorable
cards.mechanicalText: +2 movimiento a todos tus stacks este turno.
cards.mechanicalText_en: +2 movement to all your stacks this turn.

cards.name: Jinetes de la Pradera
cards.flavorText: Polvo, cascos, y el eco de cuernos lejanos.
cards.flavorText_en: Dust, hooves, and the echo of distant horns.
cards.mechanicalText: Recluta 1 caballería gratis en tu capital.
cards.mechanicalText_en: Recruit 1 mounted unit free in your capital.

cards.name: Furia del Asedio
cards.flavorText: Las torres de madera avanzan sin pausa.
cards.mechanicalText: +3 ataque a todas tus unidades durante este turno.
cards.mechanicalText_en: +3 attack to all your units this turn.

cards.name: Consejo del Dragón
cards.flavorText: El viejo dragón habla en lenguas olvidadas.
cards.flavorText_en: The old wyrm speaks in forgotten tongues.
cards.mechanicalText: Ganas 2 monedas de oro y +1 ataque a tus unidades este turno.
cards.mechanicalText_en: Gain 2 gold and +1 attack to your units this turn.
